work_item: Convert MSG forecasting baseline into the first leaderboard row
baseline_or_gap: feature branch has a strong MSG result but no unified leaderboard schema
success_criterion: feature branch contains a falsifiable leaderboard row with commit, commands, metrics, denominator, and boundaries
stop_condition: Claude rejects provenance or asks to keep the SOTA plan separate from forecasting work

baseline_or_gap: no single comparable table across detection/forecasting/edge
success_criterion: CSV/JSON schema records dataset, split, horizon, denominator, sensitivity, FAR/day, TIW, Brier, BSS, leakage status, edge cost
stop_condition: schema cannot represent both main detection and MSG forecasting without ambiguity

baseline_or_gap: metrics are scattered across scripts and reports
success_criterion: one CLI consumes predictions/events and emits standardized metric bundle plus markdown report
stop_condition: runner changes existing published numbers unexpectedly

baseline_or_gap: no proof that forecasts beat chance under realistic seizure timing assumptions
success_criterion: rate-matched, cycle-preserving, and patient-prior nulls available with documented assumptions
stop_condition: nulls show current MSG HR model is not above chance

work_item: Add Brier Skill Score and calibration report
baseline_or_gap: Brier/ECE exist in forecasting branch but no BSS against null model
success_criterion: reports include Brier, ECE, reliability bins, BSS versus selected null
stop_condition: calibration reveals severe overconfidence requiring model recalibration first

baseline_or_gap: current cycle baseline is only hour-of-day
success_criterion: cycle model includes circadian and multiday HR phase features and beats hour-of-day baseline under same split
stop_condition: MSG HR data duration insufficient for stable multiday cycles

baseline_or_gap: no direct SOTA reproduction under our runner
success_criterion: Matrix Profile/MADRID/TimeVQVAE-AD or LSTM protocol runs through leaderboard schema
stop_condition: data modality unavailable or compute cost exceeds current Hetzner budget

baseline_or_gap: edge story and forecasting story are separate
success_criterion: report compares metric loss versus RAM/latency/energy for MLP, tree, and small temporal model
stop_condition: ESP32 estimates cannot be justified from available model representation

success_criterion: abstract, contributions, related work table, methods, limitations, and reproducibility checklist drafted
stop_condition: Claude/advisor rejects scope as too broad
